title: Tithymalus sphaerospermus
intro: Tithymalus sphaerospermus, also known as Euphorbia sphaerosperma, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae). The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, with reported benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can aid in soothing skin irritations, reducing pain, and supporting immune function. The bioactive constituents of Tithymalus sphaerospermus include diterpenoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Tithymalus sphaerospermus is often used to prepare ointments, salves, and infusions, which are used topically to treat skin conditions, wounds, and joint pain.

constituents: Tithymalus sphaerospermus, also known as the globe milk thistle, contains active constituents such as silymarin, a mixture of flavonoids and polyphenols.
